page_metadata.biotools__summary: Chinook is a peer-to-peer (P2P) service for the discovery, use and assessment of bioinformatics programs. Chinook Online allows researchers to connect and run distributed bioinformatics programs using a web application.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Chinook is a peer-to-peer (P2P) service for the discovery, use and assessment of bioinformatics programs. Chinook Online allows researchers to connect and run distributed bioinformatics programs using a web application.
